blogs.title: Strangler Fig Pattern for Legacy Migration
blogs.description: Implement the Strangler Fig pattern for incremental migration from monolithic to microservices architecture: routing strategies, feature flags, gradual decomposition, and Spring Boot examples
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Sidecar Pattern
blogs.description: Implement the sidecar pattern in microservices: deploying auxiliary components alongside main services, service mesh sidecars, Spring Boot examples, and Istio integration
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Retry and Timeout Patterns
blogs.description: Implement retry and timeout patterns in microservices: exponential backoff, jitter, circuit breaker integration, Resilience4j retry, Spring Retry, and timeout configuration strategies
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Bulkhead Pattern
blogs.description: Implement the bulkhead pattern for fault isolation in microservices: thread pool isolation, semaphore isolation, Resilience4j bulkhead, Spring Boot configuration, and monitoring
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Backends for Frontends (BFF) Pattern
blogs.description: Implement the Backends for Frontends pattern: separate API gateways for each client type, mobile BFF, web BFF, GraphQL BFF, and Spring Cloud Gateway configuration
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
